metadata.title: Memescope Monday
metadata.description: The ultimate memecoin directory for Memescope Monday. Discover, submit, and vote on the hottest memecoins across Solana, Base, and BNB Chain.
metadata.keywords: Memescope Monday, memecoin, Solana, PumpFun, Base, BNB Chain, crypto, degen, meme coins

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Frequently Asked Questions about Memescope Monday

items.title: What is Memescope Monday?
items.description: Memescope Monday is a weekly event where the crypto community comes together every Monday at 10 AM UTC to discover and trade the freshest memecoins. Everyone hops on their memescope, finds gems at low market caps, and rides them together for maximum volume and gains.

items.title: When does Memescope Monday happen?
items.description: Every Monday at 10 AM UTC. The countdown on the homepage shows exactly when the next session starts. Get on bright and early for the best entries!

items.title: Which chains are supported?
items.description: We currently support Solana (including PumpFun launches), Base, and BNB Chain. Solana is the most popular chain for memecoins, but we welcome gems from all supported chains.

items.title: How do I submit a coin?
items.description: Click 'Submit Coin' in the navigation bar. Fill in the coin name, ticker, chain, contract address, and description. You can submit existing coins or upcoming launches with a launch date countdown.

items.title: What are Expedited and Trending listings?
items.description: Expedited Review ($19) gets your coin approved within 1 hour instead of waiting in the queue. Trending Placement ($49) features your coin in the Trending section for 24 hours. Bundle both for $59.

items.title: How does voting work?
items.description: Upvote coins you believe in to push them up the directory rankings. The more votes a coin gets, the higher it appears in the listings. Rally your community to vote!

items.title: What is the trollbox chat?
items.description: Each coin listing has a real-time trollbox where degens can discuss the coin, share alpha, post memes, and coordinate entries. Anonymous posting with randomly generated degen names.

items.title: Can I submit upcoming launches?
items.description: Yes! When submitting, select 'Upcoming Launch' and set the launch date. Your coin will display a countdown timer until launch, building hype and awareness before it goes live.

brand.title: Memescope Monday
brand.description: The ultimate memecoin directory. Discover gems, vote for your favorites, and ride the Monday wave together.
